## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security hardening

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds and `dist/` is committed
- [ ] CI passes (build, manifest consistency, boulder parser sync)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII in the diff
- [ ] If schema changed: both parsers updated (work-status.ts + boulder-reader.ts)
- [ ] If message text changed: no "feel free to dismiss" / consistent emoji tier

## Testing

How did you verify this change? (commands run, ZCode session tested, etc.)
